5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}], "description": "MantisBT permits a user to list and download their own attachments from an Issue created by another user, even after that Issue becomes private and direct access to it is denied.

### Impact
The loss of confidentiality caused by this vulnerability is minimal, considering that only the attachments that were previously uploaded by the user themselves remains accessible.

### Patches
- de7bdeec36de066235e38a77bf056917d951c84d

### Workarounds
None.

### Credits

Thanks to Vishal Shukla for discovering and responsibly reporting the issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00362, "percentile": 0.28509}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-rmp5-5jj7-gmvf", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-11T19:32:36Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rmp5-5jj7-gmvf", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-rmp5-5jj7-gmvf"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-34744"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-19T23:16:57Z", "published_at": "2026-05-11T19:32:36Z", "references": ["https://github.com/mantisbt/mantisbt/security/advisories/GHSA-rmp5-5jj7-gmvf", "https://github.com/mantisbt/mantisbt/commit/de7bdeec36de066235e38a77bf056917d951c84d", "https://mantisbt.org/bugs/view.php?id=36977", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-34744", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rmp5-5jj7-gmvf"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/mantisbt/mantisbt/security-advisories/GHSA-rmp5-5jj7-gmvf", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/mantisbt/mantisbt", "summary": "MantisBT has an authorization bypass that allows reading attachments after losing access to a private issue", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T14:12:29Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-rmp5-5jj7-gmvf", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.28.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "mantisbt/mantisbt"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2.28.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: MantisBT has an authorization bypass that allows reading attachments after losing access to a private issue
